detail.description: Victor Bericoto singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ernie Clement. Rafael Devers scores. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd.
Victor Bericoto singles on a line drive to right fielder Nathan Lukes. Rafael Devers scores. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Willy Adames to 3rd.
Victor Bericoto singles on a line drive to left fielder Myles Straw.
Victor Bericoto homers (3) on a fly ball to center field. Jung Hoo Lee scores.
Victor Bericoto homers (2) on a fly ball to center field.
Victor Bericoto singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tyler Soderstrom.
Victor Bericoto singles on a ground ball to left fielder Tommy Troy. Eric Haase to 2nd.
Victor Bericoto singles on a ground ball to second baseman Ketel Marte. Jung Hoo Lee to 3rd.
Victor Bericoto homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. Jung Hoo Lee scores.
Victor Bericoto doubles (1) on a fly ball to left fielder Max Kepler, deflected by center fielder Tommy Troy.
Victor Bericoto singles on a ground ball to left fielder Max Kepler. Bryce Eldridge to 2nd.
Victor Bericoto homers (1) on a fly ball to right center field.
Victor Bericoto singles on a ground ball to right fielder Sal Frelick. Daniel Susac to 2nd.
Victor Bericoto doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Jake McCarthy.
Victor Bericoto doubles (2) on a ground ball to left fielder Jake McCarthy.
